didnt_work: `rg -rn` = `--replace n`, NOT recursive+line-numbers — mangled output 3× (metadata→mnidata phantom). Type `rg -n` always; never bundle r.
Linter races: same-file Edits frequently fail with "modified since read" — re-read + retry is routine; facts.sh exists because of this.
Multi-line content through Bash command strings arrives TTY-mangled at atone's lint — use `--rca-file` (proposal filed to fix skill doc).
Docs were sometimes RIGHTER than triage data (duplicate action shipped, gemini already parameterized) — code moves between triage and edit; verify at edit time.
A full-file rewrite makes you author of preserved text too (comms.md personal-convention leak).
